Preference.android:title: Manual Database Recovery
Preference.android:summary: Attempt to salvage corrupted Activity Logs using advanced methods (.dump, .recover, or Raw Text Extraction). Use if automatic recovery failed.

af.shizuku.manager.settings.PlusFeatureP.android:title: Enable AI Core Features
af.shizuku.manager.settings.PlusFeatureP.android:summary: Global master toggle for all AI Core automation and acceleration services.

af.shizuku.manager.settings.PlusFeatureP.android:title: Experimental Accessibility Features
af.shizuku.manager.settings.PlusFeatureP.android:summary: Enable touch injection, screen capture, and window hierarchy dumping. WARNING: Privacy and security implications.

af.shizuku.manager.settings.PlusFeatureP.android:title: NPU Acceleration & Power Tuning
af.shizuku.manager.settings.PlusFeatureP.android:summary: Enable high-priority NPU scheduling and system performance modes. Supported on compatible hardware.

af.shizuku.manager.settings.PlusFeatureP.android:title: Native Window Hierarchy Crawler
af.shizuku.manager.settings.PlusFeatureP.android:summary: Use native binder-based crawler for faster UI analysis. WARNING: Comprehensive window data exposure.
